traits.name: Aura of Indulgence
traits.description:
Any non-Demon of Excess that starts its turn within 10 feet of one or more creatures with this aura must make a Wisdom Saving Throw:
DC [DC] + 1 per each additional creature with this aura within 10 feet of the target, using the highest DC of these creatures if multipleare present.
* **Failure:** The creature is Obsessed with all creatures with this aura until the start of its next turn. While Obsessed, attacks against the creature have advantage.
* **Success:** The creature is immune to the Aura of Indulgence of all creatures for 10 minutes.

traits.name: Demonette Claw
traits.description: Melee Weapon Attack: [attack] vs AC, reach 5 ft., one target. **Hit:** [damage * 2 / 3, d8] Slashing damage plus [damage * 2 / 3, d10] Psychic damage if the target is Charmed, Dazed, Drowzy, Frightened, Obsessed, [[condition/condition_1777630830518826]], or Stunned.

traits.name: Demonette Rider
traits.description: If the [name] has a controlled mount that is also a Demons of Excess, the mount can take the Attack action once on each of the [names] turns and use its bonus action on it sturn. If it takes this action, the mount cannot take Dash, Disengage, and Dodge on that turn.
